CVE-2020-14148.title: The Server-Server protocol implementation in ngIRCd before 26~rc2 ...
CVE-2020-14148.description: The Server-Server protocol implementation in ngIRCd before 26~rc2 allows an out-of-bounds access, as demonstrated by the IRC_NJOIN() function.
